sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57280" key="kh/tion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κήτιον</orth>, <sense id="n57280.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">γήτειον</ref></xr>, used as an emetic, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:266" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">266</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n57280.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κήθιον</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
